query_normalized: from chatbot to digital colleague: the paradigm shift toward persistent autonomous ai computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) same-mechanism evidence and (b) independent-or-dependent variable on the same domain, as it directly studies LLM-based autonomous agents and human-agent collaboration systems—the core mechanism and domain of the user's question about the paradigm shift toward persistent autonomous AI as "digital colleagues." As a comprehensive survey, it would serve as a canonical reference for a literature review on this topic.
